CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Name: HandleTriggerEnterEvent
CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Code:
-- =============================================== -- 사다리 판정 트리거입니다. -- =============================================== local TriggerBodyEntity = event.TriggerBodyEntity
if not isvalid(TriggerBodyEntity) then return end if not isvalid(TriggerBodyEntity.PhysicsLadderComponent) then return end
if self.SensorType == "Top" then self.Owner.PhysicsPlayerMoveComponent.IsTopLadderTouching = true elseif self.SensorType == "Bottom" then self.Owner.PhysicsPlayerMoveComponent.IsBottomLadderTouching = true end
self.Owner.PhysicsPlayerMoveComponent:InteractWithLadder(self.Entity, TriggerBodyEntity)

CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Name: HandleTriggerLeaveEvent
CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Code:
-- =============================================== -- 사다리 판정 트리거입니다. -- =============================================== local TriggerBodyEntity = event.TriggerBodyEntity
if not isvalid(TriggerBodyEntity) then return end if not isvalid(TriggerBodyEntity.PhysicsLadderComponent) then return end
local PlayerPhysicsMove = self.Owner.PhysicsPlayerMoveComponent
if self.SensorType == "Top" then PlayerPhysicsMove.IsTopLadderTouching = false
elseif self.SensorType == "Bottom" then PlayerPhysicsMove.IsBottomLadderTouching = false end
if isvalid(PlayerPhysicsMove.LadderEntity) then if not PlayerPhysicsMove.IsTopLadderTouching and not PlayerPhysicsMove.IsBottomLadderTouching then PlayerPhysicsMove:DownOnLadder(nil) end else PlayerPhysicsMove.ClimbableLadderEntity = nil end
